title: Nazaar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Nazaar1.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Maarek Stele inspecting Shuttle "Nazaar 1"]]
'''''Nazaar''''' was a group of two [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] stolen by [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] refugees during the [[Sepan Civil War]].

''Nazaar'' 1 and 2 escorted [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]] ''[[Glas]]'' as the refugees requested asylum from [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]]'s forces. The shuttles, along with [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], and other [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], protected SPC ''Glas'' from Ripoblus and [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] attackers while it docked with [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']]. Piloted by technicians, the shuttles finally entered the ''Protector's'' hangar following standard docking procedures.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
